---
title: VisualCache
description: Visual detail cache for support structures and insulators
---

## Overview

The `VisualCache` stores rendering primitives for span visual details like support arms, insulators, and fittings. These are derived from port positions and visual settings, enabling high-fidelity rendering without recomputing geometry.

## VisualPartKind

Enumeration of visual detail types.

### Values

<ResponseField name="kSupportArm" type="0">
  Support arm extending from pole to conductor attachment point. Represents physical crossarms or brackets.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="kInsulator" type="1">
  Insulator connecting conductor to support structure. Prevents electrical contact with grounded poles.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="kFitting" type="2">
  Generic hardware fitting (clamps, connectors, etc.). Used for misc. attachment hardware.
</ResponseField>

## VisualPart

A single visual primitive (cylinder) for rendering.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="kind" type="VisualPartKind" default="kSupportArm">
  Type of visual element this part represents.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="a" type="Vec3d" required>
  World-space start position of the cylindrical primitive.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="b" type="Vec3d" required>
  World-space end position of the cylindrical primitive.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="radius_m" type="double" default="0.02">
  Radius of the cylinder in meters. Defaults to 2cm for typical support structures.
</ResponseField>

## SpanVisualCacheEntry

Represents cached visual details for a single span.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="parts" type="std::vector<VisualPart>" required>
  Collection of visual primitives to render for this span. Generated based on `VisualSettings` and port positions.
</ResponseField>

<ResponseField name="source_version" type="std::uint64_t" default="0">
  Version number from `SpanRuntimeState::render_version` when this entry was last rebuilt. Used to detect stale cache entries.
</ResponseField>

## VisualCache

Container mapping span IDs to their visual cache entries.

### Fields

<ResponseField name="by_span" type="std::unordered_map<ObjectId, SpanVisualCacheEntry>" required>
  Map from span `ObjectId` to its cached visual data. Only contains entries for spans that have been processed by the render recalc pipeline.
</ResponseField>

## Visual Settings

Visual cache generation is controlled by `VisualSettings` (lines 80-87):

- **`enable_support_structures`** - Generate support arms when port position differs from ideal attachment point
- **`enable_insulators`** - Generate insulator geometry between support and conductor
- **`support_center_threshold_m`** - Distance threshold (0.03m) for determining if support is needed
- **`support_arm_extra_m`** - Extra length (0.20m) added to support arms for visual clearance
- **`insulator_radius_m`** - Radius (0.07m) of insulator cylinders
- **`insulator_length_m`** - Length (0.16m) of insulator geometry

## Version-Based Invalidation

Visual cache entries are invalidated when:
- Port positions change (manual moves, pole rotation, layout updates)
- `VisualSettings` change (enable/disable features, dimensions)
- Span connectivity changes (rerouting, attachment points)

The system compares `SpanVisualCacheEntry::source_version` against `SpanRuntimeState::render_version`.

## Querying the Cache

Use `CoreState::find_span_visual_cache()` to safely query entries:

```cpp
const SpanVisualCacheEntry* entry = core_state.find_span_visual_cache(span_id);
if (entry) {
  for (const VisualPart& part : entry->parts) {
    switch (part.kind) {
      case VisualPartKind::kSupportArm:
        render_cylinder(part.a, part.b, part.radius_m, metal_material);
        break;
      case VisualPartKind::kInsulator:
        render_cylinder(part.a, part.b, part.radius_m, ceramic_material);
        break;
      case VisualPartKind::kFitting:
        render_cylinder(part.a, part.b, part.radius_m, fitting_material);
        break;
    }
  }
}
```

Returns `nullptr` if:
- Span doesn't exist
- Visual details haven't been computed yet
- Cache was invalidated but not yet rebuilt

## Use Cases

### Rendering Support Structures
```cpp
void render_span_visuals(ObjectId span_id) {
  const SpanVisualCacheEntry* visual = core_state.find_span_visual_cache(span_id);
  if (!visual || visual->parts.empty()) {
    return; // No visual details for this span
  }
  
  for (const VisualPart& part : visual->parts) {
    // Render each visual element as a cylinder
    draw_cylinder(part.a, part.b, part.radius_m, part.kind);
  }
}
```

### Collision Detection
```cpp
bool ray_intersects_support_structure(const Ray& ray, ObjectId span_id) {
  const SpanVisualCacheEntry* visual = core_state.find_span_visual_cache(span_id);
  if (!visual) return false;
  
  for (const VisualPart& part : visual->parts) {
    if (part.kind == VisualPartKind::kSupportArm) {
      if (ray_cylinder_test(ray, part.a, part.b, part.radius_m)) {
        return true;
      }
    }
  }
  return false;
}
```
